items.title: ROSEN, SKILLED INVESTOR COUNSEL, Encourages Intuit Inc. Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action – INTU
items.summary: Rosen Law Firm has filed class action lawsuits against Intuit Inc., GRAIL Inc., and Genius Group Limited on behalf of investors who purchased securities during specified periods. The lawsuit against Intuit alleges the company made materially false statements about its competitive advantages and overstated TurboTax revenue growth guidance, while the company faced significant business losses due to competitive pressures. Investors are encouraged to join the class action or serve as lead plaintiff before the September 8, 2026 deadline.

items.title: INTU Class Action Notice: Robbins LLP Reminds Investors of the Lead Plaintiff Deadline in the Intuit Inc. Shareholder Rights Class Action
items.summary: Robbins LLP is reminding investors of a class action lawsuit against Intuit Inc. for allegedly misleading investors about the company's competitive advantages, growth prospects, and TurboTax revenue guidance. The lawsuit covers investors who purchased INTU securities between August 22, 2025 and May 20, 2026. The case was triggered by a May 20, 2026 Reuters report revealing Intuit's plan to cut 17% of its workforce and wind down offices, followed by disappointing Q3 2026 results that caused the stock to fall over 20% in a single day. The lead plaintiff deadline is September 8, 2026.

items.title: INTUIT ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Announces that a Class Action Lawsuit Has Been Filed Against Intuit Inc. and Encourages Investors to Contact the Firm
items.summary: A class action lawsuit has been filed against Intuit Inc. alleging the company made false statements about its competitive advantages and business strength. Intuit allegedly overstated TurboTax revenue growth guidance while facing significant competitive and pricing pressures. On May 20, 2026, Intuit revealed disappointing tax season results and a need to restructure its business model, causing its stock to plunge 20% ($76.86 per share) in a single day.
